title: Databricks Runtime 18: June 4, 2026
body:
### Behavioral changes

Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime.

* **`NATURAL JOIN` case-insensitive column matching**: [`NATURAL JOIN`](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-qry-select-join) now respects the `spark.sql.caseSensitive` configuration (default: `false`) when matching common columns between the left and right sides of the join. Previously, column matching was always case-sensitive, causing columns that differ only in case (for example, `ID` vs `id`) to not be recognized as common columns. This resulted in a silent cross join instead of the expected equi-join. The equivalent `USING` join already handled this correctly. To restore the previous behavior, set `spark.sql.legacy.naturalJoinCaseSensitiveColumnMatching` to `true`.
